hero.badge: The new standard for legal templates
hero.title: Draft legal documents with
hero.description: JuriScribe provides a powerful, robust template engine for legal professionals. Sign in to access premium templates, upload your own frameworks, and generate flawless PDFs in seconds.

googleDocs.title: Google Docs Interface
googleDocs.description: Enjoy a familiar, sleek editing experience. No learning curve required. Format, edit, and export just like you always have.

bankPrivacy.title: Bank-Grade Privacy
bankPrivacy.description: Your templates and client data belong to you. We employ rigorous encryption protocols to keep confidential documents secure.

customTemplates.title: Custom Templates
customTemplates.description: Upload your custom boilerplate agreements. Share them across your organization or keep them private to your account.

howItWorks.heading: How JuriScribe Works
howItWorks.subheading: From template to finalized document in three simple steps.

steps.title: Upload or Select
steps.desc: Choose from our expertly crafted public library or securely upload your own firm's proprietary DOCX templates.

steps.title: Edit & Customize with Juris AI
steps.desc: Use our intuitive editor to fill in client details, modify clauses, and tailor the document to your specific case needs. All this powered by our robust AI engine that ensures your edits maintain legal integrity.

steps.title: Export & Sign
steps.desc: Generate a perfectly formatted document ready for electronic signature or printing, saving hours of manual work.

templates.title: Featured Public Templates
templates.desc: A small sample of what is available inside JuriScribe.

features.heading: Everything you need to practice efficiently
features.subheading: Discover the powerful capabilities built directly into JuriScribe to help your legal team work faster and smarter.

cloudSynchronization.title: Cloud Synchronization
cloudSynchronization.desc: Access your firm's templates securely from any device, anywhere.

oneClickExport.title: One-click Export
oneClickExport.desc: Generate perfectly formatted, print-ready PDFs instantly.

versionControl.title: Version Control
versionControl.desc: Never lose a draft. Track changes and revert to previous template versions.

editablePdfDocx.title: Editable WORD
editablePdfDocx.desc: Easily modify templates in our built-in editor or upload your own WORD files.

Banner.title: Meet Juris AI
Banner.description: Your intelligent legal assistant is in training. Prepare for AI-powered drafting, fast clause search, generation, and intelligent reviewing in our next major release.
